---
subtitle: "A data science lab for sports analytics, economic trends, and code experiments"
listing:
  contents:
    - "sports/*.qmd"
    - "economics/*.qmd"
    - "code/*.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [image, date, title, reading-time, description, categories]
  filter-ui: true
  sort-ui: true
  image-height: 150px
  page-size: 9
  date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
  feed:
    items: 20
    type: full
page-layout: article
title-block-banner: true
---


## Latest Posts

<!-- Listing automatically generates below -->

---


<!-- Cache bust: 1771171921 -->
